themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, make decisions, and execute workflows.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools that assist developers in writing, reviewing, and debugging code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles that review, recommend, or discuss various AI tools specifically for research purposes, including UX research.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Content related to AI's ability to condense large amounts of text, such as meeting transcripts or research papers, into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Articles focusing on how AI is used to assist in product strategy, development, and management tasks.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Discussions about AI tools and techniques for analyzing user sentiment and feedback from various sources.

themes.name: AI-powered data analysis
themes.description: Content related to using AI for analyzing datasets to derive insights and support decision-making.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Articles exploring the intersection of AI with the design process and its application in research methodologies.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Research and analysis on the impact of AI on job markets, hiring, and the skills required for future roles.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Articles discussing the creation and use of artificial users, voices, or media for testing or research purposes.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
